case_title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK VS. HOWARD YEE et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, HOWARD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-07-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-06-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-20-2003
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK SERVED DEC-18-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, HOWARD

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $144.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, HOWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE, HOWARD $3,655.83 PRINCIPAL, $108.17 INTEREST, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,908.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-07-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
